step_5: Rinse with ambient temperature fresh water for 20 minutes

pre_note: Keep tank pressurized with nitrogen. Fillapproximately 5 m3 of cold fresh water slowly into the tank via the loading line. Tank pressure decreases as the PO isabsorbed. Pump water/PO mixture out. Don’t use BW machines !!! PO vapours are highly soluble in water, which could cause a vacuum-collapse of the tank. Eliminate all ignition sources.
step_1: Fill(Fillslowely 5 m3 cold fresh water over the loading line into the cargo tank. Thereafter pump PO/water slop out.)
step_2: Ventilation (Ventilate until tank isgas free)
step_3: Butterworth with ambient temperature fresh water for 40 minutes (Never start butterworth machines before tank is gas free because PO vapours are highly soluble in water, which could cause a vacuum-collapse of the tank.)
step_4: Vent, mop and dry
